title: ヒシアマ姐さんと芸術

text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon and I are heading back from a day
out, when...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whoops, I just remembered something!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Teach, if you've got time, can we add one
more thing to our to-do list?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
A-as in our plans, not a fight! See, I've got two
tickets for a museum to use up...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know, I know. That's what I said too, but
the owner of a shop I visit a lot insisted on giving
them to me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It would've been rude to keep refusing their good
will, so I caved.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I thought you'd know more about artsy
stuff than me, so wanna go?

I'm not that clued up about art either, but we end
up going to the museum together.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Whoa... This place is huge.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Check this out, Teach. It's a sculpture of an
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: It's called The Sprinting Umamusume. She definitely looks like she's about to take off!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Look, there's even a statue of a human! They're so
muscular and realistic, I wouldn't be surprised if
they started moving.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Whoever made these really went all out. It's got
me itchin' to take on a challenge myself!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you'd need some real observational skills
and grit to do this. Man, art is amazing.

We take our time walking through the museum.
Hishi Amazon is thoroughly impressed by the art.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Phew... That installation was somethin' else.
Everything had some real oomph!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not really good with complicated things... but
I seriously dig how passionate these artists are!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for tagging along, Teach. Otherwise, I
probably would have passed up the place without
givin' it a chance.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: But since you were with me, I had a great time!
choice_data_list: Let's make your running an inspiration to artists.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Me, inspiring artists? I never thought of that, but
I like it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right! I've gotta show off the new passion I feel
for art in my next run!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That'll be my way of supporting artists and their
work!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It'd be cool if someone made a real work of art
after seein' me run!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, this is no time to be standin' still! Let's hurry
back and get to training!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Come on! Time to run back to the academy!

I watch Hishi Amazon's figure disappear as she
sprints off into the distance. We leave the
museum with a new dream in tow.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Having a lot of experiences under
my belt will definitely come in handy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm no good at studying, but I know how to think
with my heart. Plus, I can learn using my five
senses!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I'm smelling something good comin' from
over there. Time to trust this nose of mine!

Hishi Amazon and I walk over to the museum cafe
together.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, check out this monster stack of pancakes.
Looks like they've recreated some of the art
pieces on them with chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I could make these as snacks for my dorm
residents, or pack them as dessert for their lunch.
Nothing like firsthand experience to get inspired,
eh?
choice_data_list:
Oh yeah, making cute box lunches is kinda your
thing, huh?

Oh yeah, making cute box lunches is kinda your
thing, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Hey, you know what? I'll pack a lunch
for you sometime as thanks for your hard work.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Culinary art is art too, after all. And I guarantee
it'll taste as good as it looks!
